'''âl-y-n-t''' ('''kalaynetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:followe|followe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:followe|followe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-y-n-t
|-
! Lemma
| kalaynetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilaynetoko|thilaynetoko]] || [[word:jilaynetoko|jilaynetoko]] || [[word:shilaynetoko|shilaynetoko]] || [[word:kilaynetoko|kilaynetoko]]
|-
